text: . gam. The conjugational tenses are formed in the Veda according to four different methods, as follows: I) According to the rule for cl. 1,
m. n. (rarely n.; the older form which occurs in the Ṛg-veda is dharman, q. v.; for 2. dharma see p. 451, col. 3), that which is to be held
rāma, as, ā, am (fr. rt. ram), pleasing, delighting, rejoicing; lovely, beautiful, charming, pleasant; obscure, dark-coloured, dark, black [
